CGTN

Copied

The opening ceremony for the Paris 2024 is set to begin at 7:30 p.m. on Friday. Instead of a traditional march into a stadium, about 6,800 athletes will parade on more than 90 boats on the Seine River for six kilometers (3.7 miles). Before the ceremony, join us and check out the various scenes in Paris, from a skyline shot to people arriving at the venue to see how the host city is prepared.

title: Live: Opening day for 2024 Olympic Games in France - CGTN

description: Let's see how the host city is prepared.
